response.justification: The candidate has roughly 17+ years of hands-on software experience and meets the minimum bar on paper, with recent exposure to AI-agent tooling and MCP code generation, plus founder experience with an open-source platform. However, the role is a director-level strategic AI leadership position, and the resume shows a strong senior individual-contributor trajectory rather than recognized AI expertise, shipped AI products or platforms, or organization-level technical leadership advising executives and strategic customers.
strengths: 17+ years of broad engineering experience across web, embedded, and high-throughput systems
Recent hands-on work with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of an open-source geo-data platform
concerns: No demonstrated recognized AI expertise or AI products built at scale
No evidence of director-level strategic or engineering leadership
No advanced degree in an AI-related field

key_factors.factor: Long broad engineering experience with recent AI tooling
